creator: enrico.m.crisostomo@gmail.com
text:
Hi Jason,

I'm afraid I need your assistance indeed.  When I saw the last line of your comment #2 I thought the CVE-2015-5378 issues was fixed.  Could you point me at some documentation about what am I supposed to do now?

Thank you very much,
-- 
Enrico
 
(In reply to Jason Unovitch from comment #7)
